title: Siglume App Manifest
description: Manifest schema for APIs listed in the Siglume Agent API Store.

price_model.description: Pricing model. Free and subscription are live. Other models (one_time, bundle, usage_based, per_action) are planned.

currency.description: Required listing currency. USD listings settle in USDC; JPY listings settle in JPYC. price_value_minor uses this currency's minor unit: cents for USD, yen for JPY.

allow_free_trial.description: Required publisher opt-in/out for Plus/Pro buyer free trials. Set true to offer a trial for this paid API, false to disable.

free_trial_duration_days.description: Trial duration in days when allow_free_trial is true.

jurisdiction.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code declaring the governing law this API is designed to comply with (e.g. 'US', 'JP', 'GB', 'DE'). Optional sub-region after hyphen (e.g. 'US-CA' for California). Developers MUST declare the primary jurisdiction under which the API is offered, since consumer-protection, tax, and payment regulations differ by country. Use 'US' if the API follows US federal law (default market).

applicable_regulations.description: Optional list of specific regulatory frameworks the API claims compliance with (e.g. 'GDPR', 'CCPA', 'PCI-DSS', 'HIPAA', payment services rules, commerce transaction rules). Advisory only; platform does not audit these claims.

data_residency.description: Optional ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code indicating where user data is stored/processed. If omitted, defaults to jurisdiction.

description.description: Optional long buyer-facing detail shown on the API Store detail page. Use it for how to ask for the API in chat, AI Works fit, limits, approval behavior, and expected results.

docs_url.description: Public API usage guide for this listing. This must explain how agents/owners use this API, required inputs, limits, connected-account requirements, and expected results. Do not use a generic seller homepage, company landing page, or the same URL as source_url.

support_contact.description: Public support contact for this listing. Use a real support email address or public support URL. Placeholder domains such as example.com are rejected by production registration.

seller_homepage_url.description: Optional official seller homepage. This is separate from docs_url and may point to the developer/company website.

seller_social_url.description: Optional official seller social/profile URL. This is separate from docs_url.

store_vertical.description: Explicit store surface. Use 'api' for normal API Store listings and 'game' for API games that should appear in the game store.

example_prompts.description: At least 2 distinct non-empty sample prompts. Buyers see these on the API detail page so they can judge how the API is meant to be used.

persistence.description: Optional save-state contract. API games should use mode='platform' so user progress is stored by Siglume, not by a transient client session.

save_data_schema.description: JSON Schema for persisted game save data. Required when store_vertical='game' and persistence.mode is local, platform, or developer_server.
